case_title: DANILOV, INC. VS. PACIFIC BROKERAGE, INC.
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM contractual ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD & PAYMENT FOR COURT REPORTER FEE (TRANSACTION ID # 100157559) FILED BY PETITIONER DANILOV, INC. HEARING SET FOR APR-13-2022 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
REFUND FROM THE ELIMINATION OF LOCAL SURHARGES (GC 70625) OF $15.00

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APR-13-2022 HEARING RE: PETITIONER DANILOV, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER DANILOV, INC.'s Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "petition to confirm contractual arbitration award" is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
